title: Range Sum Queries with Updates
description:
Given an array of n integers, answer q queries. Each query is either:
- U i x : set a[i] = x
- Q l r : output sum of a[l..r] (0-indexed, inclusive)
inputSpec: First line: n. Second line: n integers. Third line: q. Then q lines of queries.
outputSpec: For each Q query, output the sum on a separate line.

botCodes.code:
import sys
input=sys.stdin.readline
n=int(input())
a=list(map(int,input().split()))
tree=[0]*(2*n)
for i in range(n):tree[n+i]=a[i]
for i in range(n-1,0,-1):tree[i]=tree[2*i]+tree[2*i+1]
def update(i,x):
    i+=n;tree[i]=x
    while i>1:i//=2;tree[i]=tree[2*i]+tree[2*i+1]
def query(l,r):
    l+=n;r+=n+1;s=0
    while l<r:
        if l&1:s+=tree[l];l+=1
        if r&1:r-=1;s+=tree[r]
        l//=2;r//=2
    return s
q=int(input())
for _ in range(q):
    line=input().split()
    if line[0]=='U':update(int(line[1]),int(line[2]))
    else:print(query(int(line[1]),int(line[2])))
